---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for werkflow
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I can't do X without having to Y every time..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Who Benefits

Describe who would use this feature (e.g. workflow designers, platform admins, end users).

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or related issues that support this request.
